{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.3,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Improving a technical abstract requires verifying that the argumentative arc—problem motivation → prior-work gap → dual methodological contributions → quantitative payoff—is internally coherent and that each step causally supports the next.",
    "R1.3": "The draft contains multiple specific quantitative claims (JPICE MAE 1.4%, proposed MAE 1.1%, 21% relative improvement, inference times 11.2 ms vs 3.6 ms, SOH range 100%–70%) that must be mutually consistent and correctly coupled to their stated datasets (NASA PCoE, Oxford Battery Degradation Dataset); surface improvement must not inadvertently break these alignments.",
    "R1.6": "'Improve this draft' under-specified as it is, centrally loads on prose quality: sentence-level clarity, technical register consistency, concision, and paragraph cohesion are the primary deliverable."
  },
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": ""
}

rationale.R1.2: Improving a technical abstract requires verifying that the argumentative arc—problem motivation → prior-work gap → dual methodological contributions → quantitative payoff—is internally coherent and that each step causally supports the next.
rationale.R1.3: The draft contains multiple specific quantitative claims (JPICE MAE 1.4%, proposed MAE 1.1%, 21% relative improvement, inference times 11.2 ms vs 3.6 ms, SOH range 100%–70%) that must be mutually consistent and correctly coupled to their stated datasets (NASA PCoE, Oxford Battery Degradation Dataset); surface improvement must not inadvertently break these alignments.
rationale.R1.6: 'Improve this draft' under-specified as it is, centrally loads on prose quality: sentence-level clarity, technical register consistency, concision, and paragraph cohesion are the primary deliverable.
